languages.text: "О, в данном случае меня интересует скорее ваш философский взгляд на вещи, нежели практические навыки. Не подвергаю сомнению глубину ваших познаний, но техническую часть процесса я возьму на себя. Если же говорить о направленности и целях, то мои изыскания обращены на продление и оптимизацию жизненных процессов, проистекающих в органической плоти. Ключ к этому — выведение формулы праведности. Ваша помощь в данном вопросе будет неоценима!"

"Ah, well, in that case, I am interested more in your philosophical outlook rather than in your practical skills. I do not doubt the extent of your knowledge, but I myself will handle the technical aspects of the process. If you want to know about my focus and objectives, my research is dedicated to the extension and optimisation of the vital processes that occur in organic flesh. Key to this endeavour will be deriving a formula to quantify righteousness. Your assistance in this matter will be invaluable!"
languages.original_text: "О, в данном случае меня интересует скорее ваш философский взгляд на вещи, нежели практические навыки. Не подвергаю сомнению глубину ваших познаний, но техническую часть процесса я возьму на себя. Если же говорить о направленности и целях, то мои изыскания обращены на продление и оптимизацию жизненных процессов, проистекающих в органической плоти. Ключ к этому — выведение формулы праведности. If you want to know about my focus and objectives, my research is dedicated to the extension and optimisation of the vital processes that occur in organic flesh. Key to this endeavour will be deriving a formula to quantify righteousness. Your assistance in this matter will be invaluable!"

languages.text: « Ah, eh bien, je m'intéresse davantage à votre perspective philosophique qu'à vos compétences pratiques. Je ne doute pas de l'étendue de vos connaissances, mais je préfère me charger moi-même des aspects techniques du processus. Quant à mes objectifs, ils portent sur la prolongation et l'optimisation des mécanismes qui assurent la survie de la chair organique. La clé pour les atteindre consistera à dériver une formule quantifiant la vertu. Vous me serez d'une aide précieuse dans cette entreprise ! »
languages.original_text: "Ah, well, in that case, I am interested more in your philosophical outlook rather than in your practical skills. I do not doubt the extent of your knowledge, but I myself will handle the technical aspects of the process. If you want to know about my focus and objectives, my research is dedicated to the extension and optimisation of the vital processes that occur in organic flesh. Key to this endeavour will be deriving a formula to quantify righteousness. Your assistance in this matter will be invaluable!"

traits.locale_text: « Ah, eh bien, je m'intéresse davantage à votre perspective philosophique qu'à vos compétences pratiques. Je ne doute pas de l'étendue de vos connaissances, mais je préfère me charger moi-même des aspects techniques du processus. Quant à mes objectifs, ils portent sur la prolongation et l'optimisation des mécanismes qui assurent la survie de la chair organique. La clé pour les atteindre consistera à dériver une formule quantifiant la vertu. Vous me serez d'une aide précieuse dans cette entreprise ! »

languages.text: «Ah, bueno, en ese caso, me interesa más su filosofía que sus habilidades prácticas. No dudo de la amplitud de sus conocimientos, pero me encargaré personalmente de los aspectos técnicos del proceso. Si le intrigan el tema de mi investigación y mis objetivos, le diré que está dedicada a la extensión y optimización de los procesos vitales de la carne orgánica. Para este propósito, será vital la derivación de una fórmula para cuantificar la virtud. ¡Su asistencia en ese ámbito será inestimable!».
languages.original_text: "Ah, well, in that case, I am interested more in your philosophical outlook rather than in your practical skills. I do not doubt the extent of your knowledge, but I myself will handle the technical aspects of the process. If you want to know about my focus and objectives, my research is dedicated to the extension and optimisation of the vital processes that occur in organic flesh. Key to this endeavour will be deriving a formula to quantify righteousness. Your assistance in this matter will be invaluable!"

traits.locale_text: «Ah, bueno, en ese caso, me interesa más su filosofía que sus habilidades prácticas. No dudo de la amplitud de sus conocimientos, pero me encargaré personalmente de los aspectos técnicos del proceso. Si le intrigan el tema de mi investigación y mis objetivos, le diré que está dedicada a la extensión y optimización de los procesos vitales de la carne orgánica. Para este propósito, será vital la derivación de una fórmula para cuantificar la virtud. ¡Su asistencia en ese ámbito será inestimable!».

languages.text: “啊，好吧。是这样的，相比起您的实操技能，我对您的哲学观点更感兴趣。我毫不怀疑您学识的广度，但流程中的技术问题仍会由我亲自处理。或许您也想了解我的研究重点与目标，我在此简单介绍一下：我的研究致力于延伸与优化有机血肉中发生的生命进程。这项努力的关键，在于推导出一个量化正义的公式。而您在这件事上的帮助是无价的！”
languages.original_text: "Ah, well, in that case, I am interested more in your philosophical outlook rather than in your practical skills. I do not doubt the extent of your knowledge, but I myself will handle the technical aspects of the process. If you want to know about my focus and objectives, my research is dedicated to the extension and optimisation of the vital processes that occur in organic flesh. Key to this endeavour will be deriving a formula to quantify righteousness. Your assistance in this matter will be invaluable!"

traits.locale_text: “啊，好吧。是这样的，相比起您的实操技能，我对您的哲学观点更感兴趣。我毫不怀疑您学识的广度，但流程中的技术问题仍会由我亲自处理。或许您也想了解我的研究重点与目标，我在此简单介绍一下：我的研究致力于延伸与优化有机血肉中发生的生命进程。这项努力的关键，在于推导出一个量化正义的公式。而您在这件事上的帮助是无价的！”

languages.text: "Ah, gut, wenn das so ist, interessiere ich mich mehr für Eure philosophische Perspektive, als für Eure praktischen Fähigkeiten. Ich zweifle nicht am Umfang Eures Wissen, werde die technischen Aspekte des Prozesses allerdings selbst übernehmen. Falls Euch mein Fokus und meine Ziele interessieren ... meine Forschung widmet sich der Erweiterung und Optimierung der in organischem Fleisch auftretenden Vitalprozesse. Der Schlüssel dieses Unterfangens wird die Entwicklung einer Formel zur Quantifizierung von Rechtschaffenheit sein. Eure Unterstützung in dieser Angelegenheit ist von unschätzbarem Wert!"
languages.original_text: "Ah, well, in that case, I am interested more in your philosophical outlook rather than in your practical skills. I do not doubt the extent of your knowledge, but I myself will handle the technical aspects of the process. If you want to know about my focus and objectives, my research is dedicated to the extension and optimisation of the vital processes that occur in organic flesh. Key to this endeavour will be deriving a formula to quantify righteousness. Your assistance in this matter will be invaluable!"

languages.text: "Pek tabii... Pratik becerilerinizden ziyade felsefi bakış açınızla ilgileniyorum. İrfanınızın kapsamından şüphem yok ancak sürecin teknik yönlerini bizzat halledeceğim. Odağımı ve hedeflerimi bilmek isterseniz araştırmam organik, ette meydana gelen hayati süreçlerin uzatılmasına ve optimizasyonuna adanmıştır. Bu çabanın anahtarı, doğruluğu nicelleştirecek bir formül türetmek olacaktır. Bu konudaki yardımınız paha biçilemez olacak!"
languages.original_text: "Ah, well, in that case, I am interested more in your philosophical outlook rather than in your practical skills. I do not doubt the extent of your knowledge, but I myself will handle the technical aspects of the process. If you want to know about my focus and objectives, my research is dedicated to the extension and optimisation of the vital processes that occur in organic flesh. Key to this endeavour will be deriving a formula to quantify righteousness. Your assistance in this matter will be invaluable!"

traits.locale_text: "Pek tabii... Pratik becerilerinizden ziyade felsefi bakış açınızla ilgileniyorum. İrfanınızın kapsamından şüphem yok ancak sürecin teknik yönlerini bizzat halledeceğim. Odağımı ve hedeflerimi bilmek isterseniz araştırmam organik, ette meydana gelen hayati süreçlerin uzatılmasına ve optimizasyonuna adanmıştır. Bu çabanın anahtarı, doğruluğu nicelleştirecek bir formül türetmek olacaktır. Bu konudaki yardımınız paha biçilemez olacak!"

languages.text: 「ああ、そうであれば、あなたの実務能力よりも、むしろあなたの哲学的な見方に関心があります。あなたの知識の範囲については疑いませんが、私はこのプロセスにおける技術的な側面を自分で担当します。私の焦点を絞った目標について知りたいのなら、私の研究は有機的な肉体で起こる生命活動の延長と最適化に捧げられています」
languages.original_text: "Ah, well, in that case, I am interested more in your philosophical outlook rather than in your practical skills. I do not doubt the extent of your knowledge, but I myself will handle the technical aspects of the process. If you want to know about my focus and objectives, my research is dedicated to the extension and optimisation of the vital processes that occur in organic flesh."
